    1. getPosition()

Interface Positioned<P>

Type Parameters:
P - The type of the position (e.g., GeoCoordinates, Vector3D, String default).
All Known Subinterfaces:
EarthCoordinate
All Known Implementing Classes:
Address, Administration, AERCoordinate, AlbersEqualAreaCoordinate, Artifact, Artwork, Bank, BonneCoordinate, Book, Building, Building, BusinessPlace, CassiniSoldnerCoordinate, Celebration, ChatSituation, Choreography, City, City, Civilization, CivilSituation, Clothes, Community, Composition, Conflict, Country, Creature, Crowd, EarthEcosource, ECEFCoordinate, EconomicSituation, Election, ENUCoordinate, Factory, Family, Family, Film, Fossil, Gas, GeodeticCoordinate, Group, Group, HistoricalEvent, Holding, Home, Human, HumanGroup, HumanResource, Individual, Installation, Item, LambertAzimuthalEqualAreaCoordinate, LambertConformalConicCoordinate, LawSuitSituation, Liquid, Machine, MaterialResource, MedicalSituation, MercatorCoordinate, MGRSCoordinate, Mineral, Nation, Natural, Organization, OwnedPlace, Person, PhysicalObject, Picture, Place, PoliticalParty, PolyconicCoordinate, Population, PositionedEvent, Region, Resource, Ritual, Road, Robot, Sample, Settlement, Site, Situation, Society, Solid, StreetSituation, Subject, Thing, TimedPlace, Tool, Tribe, UPSCoordinate, UTMCoordinate, Vehicle, Vehicle, WorkSituation
public interface Positioned<P>
Interface for objects that have a spatial or conceptual position.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    P
    getPosition()
    Returns the position of this entity.

  • Method Details

    • getPosition

      P getPosition()
      Returns the position of this entity.
      Returns:
      the position.
